payload.description: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses. The goal of the program is to be 50% hedged for the next 12 months. Includes ULSD and compressed natural gas.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses.

payload.claim_text: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses. The goal of the program is to be 50% hedged for the next 12 months. Monthly hedges are equal to approximately 4% of the projected fuel purchases expected to occur 13-24 months from each hedge execution date.
payload.subject: Fuel Hedging Program

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA's fuel hedging program mitigates budget risk by dollar cost averaging approximately 50% of projected fuel expenses.

tool_args.label: Fuel Hedging Program has Timeline Event Oct 10 2023

payload.claim_text: While the fuel hedging program includes compressed natural gas, there are currently no active hedges.
payload.subject: Compressed Natural Gas hedges

evidence_refs.source_quote: While the fuel hedging program includes compressed natural gas, there are currently no active hedges.
